summary: Comprehensive P0 fixes testing: venue search (13 venues), header nav to /venues/search, city filter from /api/venues/cities, venue type popover with Apply button + chips, mobile Sign In button, login page role selector. All 9 backend tests + 12 frontend flows passed. One bug found: LoginPage pre-fills wrong venue owner credentials.

minor.issue: Venue owner role card pre-fills 'venue1@example.com/venue123' but correct credentials are 'venue@bookmyvenue.in/venue123'. Clicking Venue card will fail login.

integration_issues.flow: Venue owner login via role card
integration_issues.issue: LoginPage.js pre-fills venue_owner email as 'venue1@example.com' (doesn't exist in DB). Actual working credential is 'venue@bookmyvenue.in/venue123'

action_items: Fix LoginPage.js handleRoleSelect: venue_owner demo credentials should be 'venue@bookmyvenue.in/venue123' (not 'venue1@example.com/venue123')
critical_code_review_comments: LoginPage.js line 37: venue_owner demo credential 'venue1@example.com' does not exist in DB. Should be 'venue@bookmyvenue.in'

VenueSearchPage.js: React warning 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering VenueSearchPage' - setSearchParams called during render cycle in handleVenueTypeToggle. Not blocking but should be fixed.
RMDashboard.js: HTML hydration warning - <span> cannot be child of <tbody>. Pre-existing issue. Should wrap with Fragment instead.

success_rate.frontend: 92% (11/12 features pass; venue owner role card pre-fills wrong email)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes all working: 1) /venues/search shows 13 venues (not /venues which shows CityHubPage), 2) Header nav 'Discover Venues' href=/venues/search, 3) City filter uses /api/venues/cities returning Delhi/Mumbai/Gurgaon/Noida, 4) Venue Type popover has Apply button (data-testid=venue-type-apply-btn) that closes popover, chips appear below filter bar with X to remove, 5) Mobile Sign In button (data-testid=mobile-login-btn) visible on /venues/search at 390px (NOTE: landing page '/' has different header without this button), 6) Login page shows 4 role cards (Customer/RM/Venue/Admin) with data-testid=role-{id}, 7) RM card pre-fills rm1@bookmyvenue.in/rm123, Admin login→/admin/dashboard, RM login→/rm/dashboard. BUG: Venue card pre-fills wrong email venue1@example.com (should be venue@bookmyvenue.in).

backend.GET /api/venues/cities: PASS - Delhi, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Noida returned with city/slug/venue_count fields
backend.GET /api/venues?city=Delhi: PASS - 5 Delhi venues, all with city=Delhi

frontend.Venue card pre-fills venue1@example.com/: FAIL - wrong email, login will fail
